objective: Continue autonomous development until the document-driven agent system is ready for acceptance or blocked by an external requirement
completed_phases: V2.7 real execution preflight and configurable document-run adapters
V2.8 local API and project service runtime
V2.9 browser UI and async runtime
V2.10 task-boundary controls and private GitHub preflight
next_actions: Commit and push verified V2.10 task-boundary and gh-auth changes
Implement optional private repository clone/fetch through local gh when auth preflight passes
Integrate private source preparation into document-run and API source inspection where safe
Add deterministic fake-runner tests for private source behavior

tests_run.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -B -m unittest tests.test_gh_auth tests.test_execution_preflight tests.test_runtime tests.test_api_server tests.test_document_run_pipeline
tests_run.summary: 39 focused tests passed across gh auth, preflight, runtime controls, API, and document-run behavior.

tests_run.command: python -c "import json, pathlib; [print('OK ' + str(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('specs').glob('*.json') if json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) is not None]"
tests_run.summary: All JSON specs parse after V2.10 changes.

known_bugs.summary: Browser screenshot capture timed out during V2.9 verification, while DOM and HTTP static tests passed.

done_criteria: Document-driven intake accepts objective, documents, supporting files, and public GitHub repository context
Task graph and runtime handoff are generated from development documents
Dry-run execution, real-execution preflight, and audit artifacts are persisted
Local service/API path supports project creation and execution runs
Browser UI supports the document-driven workflow or a documented blocker prevents implementation
Asynchronous execution control is implemented or a documented blocker prevents implementation
Task-boundary stop/pause semantics are implemented or a documented blocker prevents implementation
Optional private GitHub access has auth preflight and source adapter or a documented blocker prevents implementation
Relevant tests, JSON schema checks, and long-running state validation pass
Progress is committed and pushed to GitHub
